testCases.ruleTitle: Detect Deployment Track Before Recommending Syntax
testCases.code: Assume Atlas-only syntax without asking deployment type or MongoDB version.

testCases.ruleTitle: Detect Deployment Track Before Recommending Syntax
testCases.code: Collect track (atlas-cloud|community-manual|k8s-operator-self-managed) and version=8.2 before giving syntax and docs links.

testCases.ruleTitle: Gate Guidance by GA vs Preview Status
testCases.code: Mark a feature production-ready without checking changelog or preview status.

testCases.ruleTitle: Gate Guidance by GA vs Preview Status
testCases.code: Check changelog, capture date/status, and include GA/Preview label in guidance.

testCases.ruleTitle: Apply Community Search Preview Safety Controls
testCases.code: Recommend Community Search for strict SLA production without checking current release status or versioned docs.

testCases.ruleTitle: Apply Community Search Preview Safety Controls
testCases.code: Check the current release-status source, record GA/Preview status, and require staging validation before production when the feature is not GA.

testCases.ruleTitle: Enforce Community Search Prerequisites and Authentication
testCases.code: db.createUser({ user: 'appUser', pwd: 'x', roles: [{ role: 'readWrite', db: 'admin' }] })

testCases.ruleTitle: Enforce Community Search Prerequisites and Authentication
testCases.code: db.createUser({ user: 'mongotUser', pwd: passwordPrompt(), roles: [{ role: 'searchCoordinator', db: 'admin' }] })

testCases.ruleTitle: Verify mongot Health Before Search Query Tuning
testCases.code: db.movies.aggregate([{ $search: { text: { query: 'test', path: 'title' } } }]) // no health checks

testCases.ruleTitle: Verify mongot Health Before Search Query Tuning
testCases.code:
curl localhost:8080/health
mongosh --eval 'db.runCommand({ listSearchIndexes: "movies" })'

testCases.ruleTitle: Constrain Dynamic Mappings and Prefer Static Index Definitions
testCases.code: db.items.createSearchIndex('default', { mappings: { dynamic: true } })

testCases.ruleTitle: Constrain Dynamic Mappings and Prefer Static Index Definitions
testCases.code: db.items.createSearchIndex('default', { mappings: { dynamic: false, fields: { metadata: { type: 'document', dynamic: { typeSet: 'metadataTypes' } } } }, typeSets: [{ name: 'metadataTypes', types: [{ type: 'token' }] }] })

testCases.ruleTitle: Respond to Search Max Fields Indexed Guardrail
testCases.code: Increase alert threshold only; keep broad root dynamic mapping.

testCases.ruleTitle: Respond to Search Max Fields Indexed Guardrail
testCases.code: Reduce indexed field surface via static mappings and split indexes, then re-check metric.

testCases.ruleTitle: Control nGram and Autocomplete Field Growth
testCases.code: db.docs.createSearchIndex('default', { mappings: { dynamic: true, fields: { title: { type: 'autocomplete', tokenization: 'nGram', minGrams: 2, maxGrams: 20 } } } })

testCases.ruleTitle: Control nGram and Autocomplete Field Growth
testCases.code: db.docs.createSearchIndex('autocomplete_idx', { mappings: { dynamic: false, fields: { title: { type: 'autocomplete', tokenization: 'edgeGram', minGrams: 2, maxGrams: 15 } } } })

testCases.ruleTitle: Select Analyzers and Operators as a Matched Pair
testCases.code: { $search: { queryString: { defaultPath: 'title', query: 'sta' } } } // used for type-ahead

testCases.ruleTitle: Select Analyzers and Operators as a Matched Pair
testCases.code: { $search: { autocomplete: { query: 'sta', path: 'title' } } } // type-ahead intent

testCases.ruleTitle: Manage Synonyms as a Controlled Data Source
testCases.code: db.sample_synonyms.insertOne({ input: 'pc' }) // invalid schema

testCases.ruleTitle: Manage Synonyms as a Controlled Data Source
testCases.code: db.sample_synonyms.insertOne({ mappingType: 'explicit', input: ['pc'], synonyms: ['computer', 'workstation'] })

testCases.ruleTitle: Use Facet-Compatible Field Types
testCases.code: db.products.aggregate([{ $searchMeta: { facet: { facets: { brands: { type: 'string', path: 'brand' } } } } }]) // brand not mapped as token

testCases.ruleTitle: Use Facet-Compatible Field Types
testCases.code: db.products.aggregate([{ $searchMeta: { facet: { operator: { text: { query: 'laptop', path: 'description' } }, facets: { brands: { type: 'string', path: 'brand' } } } } }])

testCases.ruleTitle: Structure compound Clauses for Relevance and Filtering
testCases.code: db.jobs.aggregate([{ $search: { text: { query: 'mongodb engineer', path: 'title' } } }, { $match: { location: 'remote' } }])

testCases.ruleTitle: Structure compound Clauses for Relevance and Filtering
testCases.code: db.jobs.aggregate([{ $search: { compound: { must: [{ text: { query: 'mongodb engineer', path: 'title' } }], filter: [{ equals: { path: 'location', value: 'remote' } }] } } }])

testCases.ruleTitle: Choose Search Operator by Intent
testCases.code: { $search: { queryString: { defaultPath: 'title', query: 'star wars' } } } // phrase intent

testCases.ruleTitle: Choose Search Operator by Intent
testCases.code: { $search: { phrase: { query: 'star wars', path: 'title' } } } // phrase intent

testCases.ruleTitle: Tune Score Modifiers with Controlled Weights
testCases.code: { $search: { text: { query: 'database', path: 'title', score: { boost: { value: 1000 } } } } }

testCases.ruleTitle: Tune Score Modifiers with Controlled Weights
testCases.code: { $search: { text: { query: 'database', path: 'title', score: { boost: { value: 2 } } } } }

testCases.ruleTitle: Control Search Result Shape with highlight and Stored Source
testCases.code: db.docs.aggregate([{ $search: { text: { query: 'latency', path: 'body' } } }, { $sort: { updatedAt: -1 } }])

testCases.ruleTitle: Control Search Result Shape with highlight and Stored Source
testCases.code: db.docs.aggregate([{ $search: { text: { query: 'latency', path: 'body' }, highlight: { path: 'body' }, returnStoredSource: true } }, { $project: { highlights: { $meta: 'searchHighlights' } } }])

testCases.ruleTitle: Use $searchMeta for Facet-Only Metadata Workloads
testCases.code: db.products.aggregate([{ $search: { facet: { facets: { brands: { type: 'string', path: 'brand' } } } } }])

testCases.ruleTitle: Use $searchMeta for Facet-Only Metadata Workloads
testCases.code: db.products.aggregate([{ $searchMeta: { facet: { operator: { text: { query: 'laptop', path: 'description' } }, facets: { brands: { type: 'string', path: 'brand' } } } } }])

testCases.ruleTitle: Route Prefilters Between $vectorSearch and $search.vectorSearch Correctly
testCases.code: db.docs.aggregate([{ $vectorSearch: { index: 'v', path: 'embedding', queryVector: [0.1], numCandidates: 100, limit: 10, filter: { text: { query: 'phone', path: 'title' } } } }])

testCases.ruleTitle: Route Prefilters Between $vectorSearch and $search.vectorSearch Correctly
testCases.code: db.docs.aggregate([{ $search: { index: 'hybrid', vectorSearch: { path: 'embedding', queryVector: [0.1], numCandidates: 100, limit: 10, filter: { text: { query: 'phone', path: 'title', fuzzy: { maxEdits: 1 } } } } } }])

testCases.ruleTitle: Enforce Version and Stage Gates for Fusion Pipelines
testCases.code: { $scoreFusion: { input: { pipelines: { p1: [{ $search: { text: { query: 'x', path: 'title' } } }, { $project: { title: 1 } }] } } } }

testCases.ruleTitle: Enforce Version and Stage Gates for Fusion Pipelines
testCases.code: On MongoDB 8.2+, use $scoreFusion with same-collection $search/$vectorSearch pipelines and no document-modifying stages.

testCases.ruleTitle: Choose Hybrid Strategy by Goal and Constraints
testCases.code: Use fixed 50/50 lexical-vector weights for every query family.

testCases.ruleTitle: Choose Hybrid Strategy by Goal and Constraints
testCases.code: Tune strategy and weights per intent class; add rerank for precision-critical flows.

testCases.ruleTitle: Use Alert and Metrics Runbooks for Search Operations
testCases.code: Ignore Search Max Fields Indexed alerts and continue indexing.

testCases.ruleTitle: Use Alert and Metrics Runbooks for Search Operations
testCases.code: Map each alert to first action and monitor Search Max Fields / Search Max nGram metrics.

testCases.ruleTitle: Triage Index Status Before Rebuilding
testCases.code: db.movies.dropSearchIndex('default') // no status triage

testCases.ruleTitle: Triage Index Status Before Rebuilding
testCases.code: Inspect status (Pending/Building/Stale/Failed), capture node error, then apply targeted fix.

testCases.ruleTitle: Debug with Explain, Metrics, and Process Health Signals
testCases.code: Change analyzers and boosts repeatedly without explain or metrics.

testCases.ruleTitle: Debug with Explain, Metrics, and Process Health Signals
testCases.code: db.movies.explain('executionStats').aggregate([{ $search: { text: { query: 'history', path: 'plot' } } }, { $limit: 10 }])

testCases.ruleTitle: Roll Out Index Definition Changes with Reindex Safety
testCases.code: Edit index at peak traffic without disk headroom or rollback path.

testCases.ruleTitle: Roll Out Index Definition Changes with Reindex Safety
testCases.code: Schedule change window, verify free space for old+new indexes, and keep rollback definition.

testCases.ruleTitle: Hand Off Provider and Embedding Semantics to mongodb-ai
testCases.code: Keep Voyage model compatibility, input_type, and chunking policy in mongodb-search rules.

testCases.ruleTitle: Hand Off Provider and Embedding Semantics to mongodb-ai
testCases.code: Keep search engine semantics here; hand provider/model and RAG semantics to mongodb-ai.
